tasks.label: shakedown: terminal core
tasks.command:
set -e && echo '>>> STATUS --live (3s)'; printf 'STATUS --live
' | python uDOS.py | head -n 50 && echo '>>> REPAIR auto'; printf 'REPAIR auto
' | python uDOS.py | head -n 100 && echo '>>> TREE'; printf 'TREE
' | python uDOS.py | head -n 60 && echo '>>> DASHBOARD CLI'; printf 'DASHBOARD CLI
' | python uDOS.py | head -n 80 && echo '>>> OUTPUT STATUS'; printf 'OUTPUT STATUS
' | python uDOS.py | head -n 40

tasks.label: map: APAC center sanity
tasks.command: printf 'MAP STATUS\nMAP VIEW 480 270\n' | python uDOS.py | head -n 120

tasks.label: teletext: server smoke (8080)
tasks.command: printf 'MAP TELETEXT 80 45\nMAP WEB start\n' | python uDOS.py

tasks.label: server: kill 8080/8887/8888/8889/8890
tasks.command: for p in 8080 8887 8888 8889 8890; do lsof -ti :$p | xargs -r kill -9; done
